features: *REMOVING MAKE UP*: Perfect tool to use when doing makeup and trying different styles, perfect for removing nail polish.
*APLYING SKIN CARE PRODUCTS*: You are on a skin care routine! This the pack with soft balls and gentle to your skin when applying lotions, oils and powders.
*CLEANING WOUNDS*: Sorry for the bad experience, this pack of cotton wool balls are soft and gentle, guarantees best user experience.
*CLEANING BABYS SKIN*: As a caring parent, child’s skin care is a priority, have the child experience soft soothing caring balls.
*100 PACK COTTON WOOL BALLS*: Never worry about running out of balls soon or midmonth while out of cash, this pack covers you for months.
description: Product description Athena Beaute Cotton Balls are perfect, soft cotton balls which are produced in 100% cotton. The package contains as many as 100 pieces that can be used to remove makeup, cleanse the skin, remove nail polish or creative projects. They are perfect for baby and family care as well as your everyday beauty regime. They are designed to maintain their shape and not leave unwanted cotton fibres on your baby's skin Safety Warning Plastic bags are dangerous. To avoid danger of suffocation, please keep this bag away from babies and children. Store in a cool, dry place.
